summary: Iteration 104 - GPS Radius Fix, Manual Check-in Review, and Review Timeout: 6/9 backend tests passed. Code-level verification confirms all 4 fixes are correctly implemented. API-level tests for GPS radius failed due to a separate bug: appointment creation endpoint does not save gps_radius_meters field.

critical.issue: gps_radius_meters field is not being saved when creating appointments. The field is accepted in the request but not persisted to the database. This prevents testing the GPS radius fix.

backend_pytest: ✅ test_scheduler_module_has_review_timeout_job - review_timeout_job registered in scheduler.py, runs every 6 hours
✅ test_review_timeout_constants - REVIEW_TIMEOUT_DAYS = 15, run_review_timeout_job exists, sets outcome to 'waived' and decided_by to 'system_timeout'
✅ test_gps_radius_uses_actual_radius - evidence_service.py uses actual_radius from appointment.get('gps_radius_meters', DEFAULT_GPS_RADIUS_METERS)
✅ test_manual_checkin_only_flag - manual_checkin_only flag computed correctly: has_checkin and not has_qr and not has_gps_close
code_verification: ✅ GPS radius fix (evidence_service.py lines 440-445, 563-568): gps_within_radius uses actual_radius = appointment.get('gps_radius_meters', DEFAULT_GPS_RADIUS_METERS)
✅ Manual check-in only flag (evidence_service.py line 808): manual_checkin_only = has_checkin and not has_qr and not has_gps_close and not has_video
✅ Manual check-in review (attendance_service.py lines 331-366): manual_checkin_only triggers review_required=True
✅ Review timeout job (attendance_service.py lines 856-925): REVIEW_TIMEOUT_DAYS=15, run_review_timeout_job auto-resolves to 'waived' with decided_by='system_timeout'
✅ Scheduler registration (scheduler.py lines 48-54, 176-183): review_timeout_job runs every 6 hours
✅ PendingReviewSection component (PendingReviewSection.js): Présent/Absent buttons with data-testid, confirmation flow, timeout display
✅ AttendancePanel reclassify fix (AttendancePanel.js line 112): onReclassify(record.record_id, key) uses record_id not participant_id

backend_pytest: ❌ test_01_gps_within_radius_uses_configured_radius - Cannot test because gps_radius_meters is not saved in appointment
❌ test_02_nearby_gps_does_not_count_as_close - Cannot test because gps_radius_meters is not saved in appointment
❌ test_03_manual_checkin_only_requires_review - Cannot test because appointment creation fails (missing gps_radius_meters persistence)

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix appointment creation endpoint to persist gps_radius_meters field. The field is used in evidence_service.py but never saved when creating appointments.
After fixing gps_radius_meters persistence, re-run API tests to verify GPS radius logic works end-to-end
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ evidence_service.py (lines 440-445, 563-568): GPS radius fix correctly implemented - uses actual_radius from appointment config
✅ attendance_service.py (lines 331-366): Manual check-in only correctly triggers review_required=True
✅ attendance_service.py (lines 856-925): Review timeout job correctly implemented with 15-day timeout
✅ scheduler.py (lines 48-54, 176-183): review_timeout_job correctly registered to run every 6 hours
✅ PendingReviewSection.js: Component correctly implements Présent/Absent buttons with confirmation flow
✅ AttendancePanel.js (line 112): Reclassify correctly uses record.record_id instead of participant_id
⚠️ BUG: Appointment creation endpoint does not save gps_radius_meters field - this is a separate bug not related to the 4 fixes

success_rate.backend: 67% (6/9 passed - 3 failed due to gps_radius_meters persistence bug)
success_rate.frontend: N/A (could not test due to session issues, but code review confirms implementation is correct)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 4 fixes (GPS radius, manual check-in review, PendingReviewSection UI, review timeout job) are all correctly implemented at the code level. However, there is a separate bug: the appointment creation endpoint does not persist the gps_radius_meters field, which prevents end-to-end testing of the GPS radius fix. The main agent needs to fix the appointment creation endpoint to save gps_radius_meters before the GPS radius tests can pass. The reclassify API works correctly with record_id. The scheduler has review_timeout_job registered to run every 6 hours.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The appointment creation endpoint in /app/backend/routers/appointments.py does not include gps_radius_meters in the fields that are persisted to the database. The evidence_service.py correctly reads this field with a default fallback, but since it's never saved, all appointments use the default 200m radius.
reproduction_steps: 3. Observe that gps_radius_meters is None instead of 100
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add gps_radius_meters to the appointment creation and update logic in /app/backend/routers/appointments.py
